summary: Verified Like feature removal from CineWorld Studios app. All 6 backend endpoint removal tests passed (404 responses). Frontend UI tests confirmed removal of Like-related elements.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage.jsx still displays total_likes in player profile stats (lines 544-547). Consider removing if this should also be hidden from users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Like feature removal verified. Backend endpoints /api/social/feed, /api/social/top-liked, /api/social/my-bonuses, /api/films/{id}/like, /api/films/{id}/likes all return 404. Frontend Dashboard no longer shows 'Interagisci con altri player' CTA or Like stat card. CineBoard no longer has social-feed or top-liked views. Note: virtual_likes display is intentionally kept for internal game scoring.
